description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, and deploy, using a global docker:latest image and a docker:dind service, and defining DOCKER_DRIVER and SBT_OPTS variables. Add a before_script that sources ci/prepare for all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that uses the logimethods/docker-sbt-docker image and runs `sbt appJVM/test`. In the build stage add a build job that also uses logimethods/docker-sbt-docker, runs `sbt appJS/fullOptJS`, then `docker_login`, then `sbt appJVM/dockerBuildAndPush`, and stores the `webapp` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs on the master branch, copies `webapp` to `public`, and publishes `public` as a pages artifact; add a staging job that runs on all branches except production, sets the staging environment, and executes `docker_retag_and_push $CI_BUILD_REF staging`; and add a production job that runs only on the production branch, sets the production environment, and executes `docker_retag_and_push $CI_BUILD_REF production`.
